description: Betting exchange service contract v1 — 22 operations across discovery, pricing, account, orders, and system management. Designed for two-sided exchange markets (back/lay). Operation names chosen for future alignment with securities-exchange-v1.

operations.description: List sport/event categories with market counts
operations.name: event_types

operations.description: List events (matches, races) with filters
operations.name: events

operations.description: Market metadata: names, runners, event info, start times
operations.name: market_catalogue

operations.description: Live market data: prices, volumes, status, in-play flag
operations.name: market_book

operations.description: Account balance, exposure, and commission info
operations.name: account_funds

operations.description: List active/unmatched orders
operations.name: current_orders

operations.description: Session status, auth method, write gate, rate limits
operations.name: login_status

operations.description: Refresh session token to prevent expiry
operations.name: keepalive

operations.description: List competitions (leagues, tournaments) within a sport
operations.name: competitions

operations.description: Detailed price/volume data for a single selection
operations.name: runner_book

operations.description: Browse sport/event/market hierarchy tree
operations.name: navigation

operations.description: Account info: name, country, currency, timezone
operations.name: account_details

operations.description: Transaction history (bets, deposits, withdrawals)
operations.name: account_statement

operations.description: Settled/voided orders with profit and settlement dates
operations.name: cleared_orders

operations.description: Per-selection profit/loss in a market
operations.name: market_pnl

operations.description: List venues (racing tracks) with market counts
operations.name: venues

operations.description: Exchange rates for currency conversion
operations.name: currency_rates

operations.description: Place bets (real money). Requires write gate + confirm gate
operations.name: place_orders

operations.description: Cancel unmatched/partially matched bets
operations.name: cancel_orders

operations.description: Update persistence type on unmatched bets
operations.name: update_orders

operations.description: Atomically cancel and re-place at new price
operations.name: replace_orders

operations.description: Dead-man switch: auto-cancel bets on disconnect
operations.name: heartbeat

title: betting-exchange-v1
